title: trichodium capillare
intro: Trichodium capillare, also known as witch's hair grass or forked hair grass, is a species of grass native to the Southern Hemisphere. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Trichodium capillare is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Trichodium capillare can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to calm the nerves and promote relaxation.
